title: Recognizing scams & predatory products module (recognize + verify; names no brands)
context: Learners with limited financial experience are disproportionately targeted by predatory financial products and scams — payday loans, rent-to-own, MLM, 'credit-repair', advance-fee scams, and other schemes. This module must teach red flags and verification steps (how to check a claim or entity via public/nonprofit resources) without naming specific brands or products. The 'recognize and verify' approach is more durable than brand-specific warnings because new predatory products emerge constantly. The module is gated on the Budgeting module being complete and a credentialed reviewer being engaged.
objective: Draft, cite, plain-language review, accessibility review, linter-clean, and credentialed-expert-sign-off the Recognizing scams and predatory products module teaching red flags and verification steps by category — without naming specific brands or products.
acceptanceCriteria: Teaches red flags for predatory product categories (payday/high-cost lending, rent-to-own, MLM, 'credit-repair', debt-settlement, advance-fee/phishing scams) by describing category tactics — not naming specific brands or companies

Teaches concrete verification steps using public/nonprofit resources (e.g., government consumer-finance agency complaint databases, nonprofit financial counselor referrals) — never routing to commercial 'scam checker' products
All factual and numeric claims cited to vetted openly-licensed authoritative sources; jurisdiction-specific consumer-protection details labeled by jurisdiction
Linter-clean: no product/brand names, no affiliate patterns; 'Educational information, not financial advice' framing and non-commercial redirect present
Readability at or below grade 8; plain-language review passed; WCAG 2.2 AA met; a11y review passed
MDX frontmatter conforms to the content JSON Schema: sources[], reviewer, reviewedVersion, signoffDate, jurisdiction='neutral', notAdviceFraming:true, license=CC-BY-4.0
Credentialed financial-educator sign-off and product-neutrality reviewer sign-off recorded for the shipped version; strings externalized for i18n
output: A reviewed, signed-off Recognizing scams and predatory products module (content/lessons/scams-and-predatory-products.mdx) with full provenance metadata, linter-clean, accessible, plain-language, and translation-ready.
